word: G981 - βίωσις - bíōsis - bee'-o-sis - Manner of life

sections.paragraph:
- Original: Βίωσις

- Transliteration: Biosis

- Phonetic: bee'-o-sis

- Definition:

1. manner of living and acting, way of life

- Origin: from G980

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G980; living (properly the act by implication the mode): - manner of life
